# poisutils

An R package of utility functions for Poisson Consulting’s scripts and
packages.

## Demonstration

``` r

library(poisutils)

x <- 1
is.named(x)
#> [1] FALSE
names(x) <- "one"
is.named(x)
#> [1] TRUE
```

## Installation

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("poissonconsulting/poisutils")
```

## Contribution

Please report any
[issues](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/poisutils/issues).

[Pull requests](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/poisutils/pulls)
are always welcome.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the poisutils project is released with a [Contributor
Code of
Conduct](https://contributor-covenant.org/version/2/0/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`error()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/error.md)
  : Error Message
- [`hex_to_dec()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/hex_to_dec.md)
  : Hexadecimal to Decimal Code Converter
- [`is.named()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/is.named.md)
  : Test if named
- [`is.syntactic()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/is.syntactic.md)
  : Is syntactic
- [`ps_create_dir()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_create_dir.md)
  : Create Directory
- [`ps_error()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_error.md)
  : Error Message
- [`ps_h2d_tag()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_h2d_tag.md)
  : Convert Hexidecimal to Decimal PIT Tags
- [`ps_message()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_message.md)
  : Diagnostic Message
- [`ps_nfold_change()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_nfold_change.md)
  : n-Fold Change
- [`ps_plural()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_plural.md)
  : Plural
- [`ps_prop2nfold_change()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_prop2nfold_change.md)
  : Proportional Change to n-Fold Change
- [`ps_prop_change()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_prop_change.md)
  : Proportional Change
- [`ps_punctuate()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_punctuate.md)
  : Punctuate
- [`ps_rename_object()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_rename_object.md)
  : Rename Object
- [`ps_round_preserve_sum()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_round_preserve_sum.md)
  : Round Values while Preserving their Rounded Sum
- [`ps_sma()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_sma.md)
  : Simple Moving Average
- [`ps_warning()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/ps_warning.md)
  : Warning Message
- [`user()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisutils/reference/user.md)
  : Get user
